overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through a futuristic urban commercial district. The player character walks along city sidewalks, passes under a corporate overpass with Arasaka signage, continues along palm-lined streets with construction cranes visible in the skyline, and enters a covered plaza area with digital billboards and seating.

events.description: passing under the yellow Arasaka overpass into the shaded area beneath

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk toward the yellow overpass structure with corporate signage

entered.detail: elevated yellow transit structure spanning across the street with stairs visible on the left
corporate signage with red circular logos mounted on the overpass structure
tall multi-story building with reflective glass facade and neon advertisements
small food vendor stall with red and yellow signage on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a concrete sidewalk approaching a prominent yellow overpass structure adorned with Arasaka corporate signage. The camera moves forward beneath the overpass, transitioning from open sky to partial cover. A modern glass building rises on the left while pedestrians walk ahead on the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined urban waterfront street with construction skyline

events.description: emerging from under the overpass shadow into direct morning sunlight
passing a digital advertisement kiosk while vehicles drive by on the adjacent road

agents.ego_description: walking along the open sidewalk with palm trees lining the street and construction cranes visible in the distant skyline

notable_agents.action: woman standing near the Pure Overkill digital kiosk looking at the advertisement

entered.detail: row of tall palm trees lining the edge of the street along the waterfront
multiple construction cranes visible against the skyline behind distant skyscrapers
digital advertisement kiosk displaying Pure Overkill branding with a figure silhouette

segments.scene_description: Exiting the overpass shadow into bright morning light, the scene opens to a wide waterfront street lined with palm trees. Construction cranes dot the distant skyline. The camera passes a digital advertisement kiosk on the right while pedestrians walk in the opposite direction and vehicles move along the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with overhead digital signage

events.description: entering covered walkway with multiple levels of overhead digital billboards and building overhangs
passing food vendor stalls with neon lighting and aromatic steam visible

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered walkway beneath stacked digital billboards, passing other pedestrians and street vendors

notable_agents.action: child running ahead on the sidewalk wearing a white shirt

entered.detail: multiple tiers of glowing digital advertisement screens mounted on building overhangs above the walkway
row of food vendor stalls with neon signs and serving counters along the building facade
opening to a plaza area with benches visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a semi-covered commercial walkway shaded by building overhangs and dense with overhead digital billboards. The sidewalk is populated with moderate pedestrian traffic including a child running ahead. Food vendor stalls with neon lighting line the left side while the path continues toward a distant plaza entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with seating and tree canopy

events.description: entering open plaza area with white benches and large trees replacing the covered walkway

agents.ego_description: entering the plaza area and turning slightly left while walking past white benches and large trees

entered.detail: white concrete benches arranged in rows on the left side of the plaza
mature trees with dense canopies providing shade over the plaza area
open paved area with reflective wet surfaces and scattered pedestrians

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into an open urban plaza featuring white benches and large shade trees. The covered walkway with digital billboards gives way to this more open space with paved tiles and scattered pedestrians. The camera moves through the plaza, passing benches on the left while heading toward the tree-lined center area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a corporate transit corridor into a bright, open urban plaza. It begins on a concrete sidewalk, moving beneath a prominent yellow overpass adorned with Arasaka signage as a modern glass building rises to the left. As the camera exits the shadow of the overpass, the scene opens into bright morning light along a wide waterfront street lined with palm trees and distant construction cranes. The environment then shifts into a semi-covered commercial walkway shaded by building overhangs and dense with overhead digital billboards and neon food stalls. Finally, the covered path gives way to an open urban plaza featuring white benches and large shade trees, with the camera gliding across paved tiles toward the center of the square.
